info.title: FortiManager JSON API Documentation
info.description:
Documentation for FortiManager JSON API

This module contains APIs to read and modify Device Manager database objects such as device, adom, and group list. All API for this module are under the prefix /dvmdb/.

For additional commands such as adding or removing devices, please refer to the Device Manager Command daemon.

tags.name: /dvmdb/device/replace/sn
tags.description: Replace device's serial number with new value.

tags.name: /dvmdb/script/execute
tags.description: Run script.

tags.name: /dvmdb/script/log/latest
tags.description: Get the latest script log of the ADOM.

tags.name: /dvmdb/script/log/latest/device
tags.description: Get the latest script log of a device.

tags.name: /dvmdb/script/log/list
tags.description:
Get the of script logs of the ADOM. The amount of data to retrieve can be controlled by the range option.

This API call return the full script run result; however, retrieve all result may be slow and result in a large response. It is suggested to retrieve the summary list first to determine the proper range.

tags.name: /dvmdb/script/log/list/device
tags.description:
Get the latest of script logs of a device. The amount of data to retrieve can be controlled by the range option.

This API call return the full script run result; however, retrieve all result may be slow and result in a large response. It is suggested to retrieve the summary list first to determine the proper range.

tags.name: /dvmdb/script/log/output/device/logid
tags.description: Get a specific script log entry of a device.

tags.name: /dvmdb/script/log/output/logid
tags.description: Get a specific script log entry of an ADOM.

tags.name: /dvmdb/script/log/summary
tags.description:
Get a list of script logs of the ADOM. The amount of data to retrieve can be controlled by the range option.

This API call does not return the content of script log.

tags.name: /dvmdb/script/log/summary/device
tags.description: Get a list of script logs of a device. The amount of data to retrieve can be controlled by the range option. This API call does not return the content of script log.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workflow/start
tags.description:
Continue a workflow session. Start a new session if ID is not specified in the request.

Refer to workflow and wflog object for retrieving session information.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/commit
tags.description: Commit change(s) of an entire ADOM.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/commit/dev
tags.description: Commit change(s) of a device.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/commit/obj
tags.description: Commit change(s) of a specific object, where the url contains the full path to the object (eg. firewall/address/obj_name).

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/commit/pkg
tags.description: Commit change(s) of a specific package, where the url includes both the folder(s) and name of the policy package.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/dirty
tags.description:
Get the dirty status of an ADOM.
To get the dirty status of a specific object, use workspace/lockinfo instead.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/dirty/dev
tags.description: Get the dirty status of an device..

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/lock
tags.description: Lock an entire ADOM.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/lock/dev
tags.description: Lock a device.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/lock/obj
tags.description: Lock a specific object, where the url contains the full path to the object (eg. firewall/address/obj_name).

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/lock/pkg
tags.description: Lock a specific package, where the url includes both the folder(s) and name of the policy package.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/lockinfo
tags.description: Get the lock information of an ADOM.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/lockinfo/dev
tags.description: Get the lock information of a device.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/lockinfo/obj
tags.description: Get the lock information of a specific object, where the url contains the full path to the object (eg. firewall/address/obj_name).

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/lockinfo/pkg
tags.description: Get the lock information of a specific package, where the url includes both the folder(s) and name of the policy package.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/unlock
tags.description: Unlock an entire ADOM.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/unlock/dev
tags.description: Unlock a device.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/unlock/obj
tags.description: Unlock a specific object, where the url contains the full path to the object (eg. firewall/address/obj_name).

tags.name: /dvmdb/workspace/unlock/pkg
tags.description: Unlock a specific package, where the url includes both the folder(s) and name of the policy package.

common.filter.object.description: Filter the result according to a set of criteria.

common.range.object.description: Limit the number of output. For a range of [a, n], the output will contain n elements, starting from the ath matching result.

common.sort.object.description: Specify the sorting of the returned result.

content.description: The full content of the script result log.

The full content of the script result log.

seq.description: Log sequence, with 1 being assigned to the latest result.

The dirty status of the ADOM where the object is belonged to.
0 not dirty

Database type of the locked object.
0 device database
1 ADOM database
2 provider (global) database

dev_oid.description: The ID of the locked device.

1 dirty

lock_sid.description: The ID of the Session that locked the object.

lock_time.description: The time when the object was locked.

lock_user.description: The admin user who locked the object.

params.dvmdb.get.table.option.opts.description:
Set fetch option for the request. If no option is specified, by default the attributes of the objects will be returned.
count - Return the number of matching entries instead of the actual entry data.
syntax - Return the attribute syntax of a table or an object, instead of the actual entry data. All filter parameters will be ignored.
